content:
# Maximum Flooding Surface

**Summary**: A stratigraphic surface representing the maximum extent of a marine transgression.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] identified the maximum-flooding-surface in the D7 unit.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] Used to identify major transgressive events in the Dhruma Formation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] Analysis of foraminiferal distribution patterns.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified as a key tool for refining sequence stratigraphy and identifying J35-J40 surfaces. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 25]])
